memo_reasons: no artifact-backed original results survived validation
no original result resolved to a real saved artifact

reference_catalog.text: CDC Data search result: Youth And Tobacco Use Infographic. Accession: g9dy-mhts. https://data.cdc.gov/Survey-Data/Youth-And-Tobacco-Use-Infographic/g9dy-mhts. Topic-relevant CDC page was found, but in this run it did not yield a machine-readable teen-by-Asian subgroup dataset suitable for direct prevalence estimation.

CDC Data search result: Race and Ethnic Disparities in Cigarette Smoking Among Adults. Accession: 4ntf-u76j. https://data.cdc.gov/Survey-Data/Race-and-Ethnic-Disparities-in-Cigarette-Smoking-A/4ntf-u76j. Accessible CDC result concerned adults rather than teenagers, so it was not suitable for the study question.

GitHub repository hint: BRFSS 2015 diabetes dataset mirror. Accession: anandprakash0/Diabetes-prediction. https://github.com/anandprakash0/Diabetes-prediction. Repository description indicates BRFSS 2015 diabetes health indicators files, which are unrelated to smoking prevalence among Asian teens.

summary: Routing to a research memo because the run did not clear the paper gate.
